<!-- Auto-generated by bin/build-agent-skills.ts — do not edit manually. -->

# Anglesite — Open Agent Skills

Spec-compliant [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) (skills.sh) generated from the
Anglesite Claude Code plugin. Each skill is self-contained: bundled reference
material lives in its `references/` directory.

> Generated — do not edit by hand. Edit the plugin sources in `skills/` and run
> `npm run build:agent-skills`.

**Version:** 1.2.0 · **License:** ISC · 56 skills

## Install

Install an individual skill from this repo with the skills.sh CLI:

```sh
npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/<skill>
```

## Skills

| Skill | Install | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `add-store` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/add-store` | Add ecommerce to your site — sells physical goods, digital downloads, services, or software |
| `animate` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/animate` | Design CSS animations: hover effects, scroll reveals, page transitions |
| `backup` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/backup` | Back up site changes to GitHub, or restore an earlier snapshot |
| `booking` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/booking` | Embed appointment scheduling (Cal.com or Calendly) into the site |
| `business-info` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/business-info` | Collect and display business hours, address, phone, and LocalBusiness JSON-LD |
| `buy-button` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/buy-button` | Add a buy button to sell a product, service, or digital good (Stripe or Polar) |
| `check` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/check` | Health audit and troubleshooting |
| `consent` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/consent` | Add a category-based GDPR/CCPA cookie consent banner that gates third-party loads |
| `contact` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/contact` | Set up a contact form with Cloudflare Workers and Turnstile |
| `convert` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/convert` | Convert an existing static site generator project (Hugo, Jekyll, Next.js, Gatsby, Nuxt, Docusaurus, VuePress, MkDocs, Eleventy, Hexo) to Anglesite/Astro |
| `copy-edit` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/copy-edit` | Audit and coach website copy for clarity, tone, and brand voice |
| `creative-canvas` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/creative-canvas` | Add interactive visual effects and creative coding to any page |
| `deploy` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/deploy` | Build, security scan, and deploy to Cloudflare Workers |
| `design-import` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/design-import` | Import design tokens and page layouts from a Canva site, Figma file, or freedesignmd system to build your Astro site |
| `design-interview` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/design-interview` | Redo the visual identity and branding |
| `domain` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/domain` | Manage DNS records: email, Bluesky, verification |
| `donations` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/donations` | Add a donation button or page (Stripe, Liberapay, or GitHub Sponsors) with suggested amounts, recurring defaults, optional goal widget, and 501(c)(3) tax-receipt template |
| `email` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/email` | Set up business email: Apple-first provider recommendation, DNS pre-fill, tier routing |
| `experiment` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/experiment` | Propose, run, and analyze A/B tests to improve conversions |
| `export` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/export` | Produce a portable export of the site (built HTML, content, media, MIGRATING.md) so the owner can self-host or move to any other platform |
| `forms` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/forms` | Build custom forms (RSVP, lead capture, survey, callback) with Keystatic-defined fields, Turnstile, and per-form rate limiting |
| `freedesignmd` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/freedesignmd` | Browse, fetch, and apply a design system from freedesignmd.com to the project |
| `giscus` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/giscus` | Add blog comments via Giscus (uses GitHub Discussions as the storage backend) |
| `i18n` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/i18n` | Set up multi-language support with localized routes, hreflang, and language switcher |
| `import` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/import` | Import content from a website URL (WordPress, Squarespace, Wix, Webflow, GoDaddy, Ghost, Medium, Substack, Blogger, Shopify, Weebly, Tumblr, Micro.blog, WriteFreely, Carrd) or static site generator project |
| `inbox` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/inbox` | Browse, triage, and export form submissions from Keystatic instead of digging through email |
| `indieweb` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/indieweb` | Deploy self-owned IndieAuth, Webmention, and Micropub endpoints on your domain |
| `lemon-squeezy` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/lemon-squeezy` | Add a Lemon Squeezy checkout overlay for digital product sales (alternative to Polar) |
| `membership` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/membership` | Gate premium content with newsletter (free) or Stripe (paid) — signed-cookie unlocks at the edge |

| `pwa` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/pwa` | Make the site installable as a Progressive Web App with offline support |
| `qr` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/qr` | Generate QR codes with UTM tracking, shortlink redirects, and campaign-tagged URLs |
| `redirects` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/redirects` | Manage the _redirects file: add, remove, list, validate, and bulk-import redirects (301 / 302 / 308) |
| `reputation` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/reputation` | Surface review response suggestions and competitive insights based on business type |
| `search` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/search` | Add on-site search so visitors can find content quickly |

| `shopify-buy-button` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/shopify-buy-button` | Set up Shopify Buy Button for a full physical product catalog with dashboard |
| `snipcart` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/snipcart` | Set up Snipcart ecommerce for a small physical product catalog |
| `social-media` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/social-media` | Proactive social media strategy, content calendars, and profile optimization |

| `syndicate` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/syndicate` | Generate social media posts from a blog post for POSSE syndication |
| `testimonials` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/testimonials` | Set up customer review collection, moderation, and display with star ratings |
| `themes` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/themes` | Present pre-built visual themes from freedesignmd plus built-in quick-picks, then apply the owner's choice |
| `tracking` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/tracking` | Embed Meta Pixel, Google Ads / GA4, LinkedIn, TikTok, Pinterest, or X conversion pixels via @astrojs/partytown (off the main thread), plus Microsoft Clarity analytics (heatmaps + session recording) on the main thread. All gated behind cookie consent. |
| `update` | `npx skills add Anglesite/anglesite/agent-skills/update` | Update site dependencies and template files to the latest version |
